name: noyona/term
title: Term Overview
description: Hero + policy cards linking to policy landing pages.

subheading.default: At Noyona Cosmetics and Skin Care Products OPC, we prioritize transparency and trust by providing clear guidelines on how we handle your orders, protect your rights, and ensure a seamless shopping experience.

sectionIntro.default: Welcome to Noyona Essentials and Skin Care Products OPC. We value transparency and customer trust, so we have organized our policies into three clear sections: Terms of Service, Shipping Policy and Refund Policy.

default.title: Terms of Service
default.description: Shop Noyona Essentials-fair rules, personal use only, and policies designed to protect your shopping experience.

default.title: Shipping Policy
default.description: Reliable delivery with clear updates; shipping risks transfer at carrier pickup, but we are here to support you.

default.title: Refund Policy
default.description: Your satisfaction matters-refunds and exchanges follow strict guidelines to keep shopping safe and worry-free.
